Terraform AWS Infrastructure Setup: This Terraform configuration provisions the core AWS infrastructure for the platform, including a VPC with public and private subnets across three availability zones, an Application Load Balancer, an ECS Fargate cluster, and an RDS PostgreSQL instance in Multi-AZ mode. Remote state is stored in an S3 bucket with DynamoDB state locking to prevent concurrent modifications. All resources are tagged with environment, project, and owner tags for cost allocation and governance. The configuration is parameterized via a variables.tf file, enabling reuse across dev, staging, and production environments with a single terraform workspace per environment.
